messages.author: emi
messages.text: https://github.com/kore-signet/chiyocore Working on a custom, from-scratch implementation of meshcore firmware, in Rust, for ESP32 boards. nifty features: supports most of the meshcore companion protocol, so you can use the standard apps supports multiple nodes with different setups (combinations of companion + repeater + bot + observer + etc) on one board (repeater + observer + more complex bots are all todos; currently you can just run several companions and ping bots at once lol) (this is not meant to be for mobile repeaters at all) all configuration of these setups is done in a single human readable config file! works on multicore ESP32s using both cores at once very speedy (hardware accelerated cryptography) fun project :) still very much a wip! it is extremely untested , currently only really works on ESP32-S3s, and I have only actually run it on my XiaoS3 kit from Seeed. other boards are still a todo.
messages.content_html:
https://github.com/kore-signet/chiyocore Working on a custom, from-scratch implementation of meshcore firmware, in Rust, for ESP32 boards. nifty features:
  • supports most of the meshcore companion protocol, so you can use the standard apps
  • supports multiple nodes with different setups (combinations of companion + repeater + bot + observer + etc) on one board
    • (repeater + observer + more complex bots are all todos; currently you can just run several companions and ping bots at once lol)
    • (this is not meant to be for mobile repeaters at all)
  • all configuration of these setups is done in a single human readable config file!
  • works on multicore ESP32s using both cores at once
  • very speedy (hardware accelerated cryptography)
  • fun project :) still very much a wip! it is extremely untested, currently only really works on ESP32-S3s, and I have only actually run it on my XiaoS3 kit from Seeed. other boards are still a todo.
